../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Formats age as years/months/days string
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Computes relativedelta between today and birthday, returns formatted string with pluralized units. Appends birthday cake emoji if month/day diff is zero.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Returns 's' unless unit==1
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Takes numeric unit, returns empty string if 1 else 's'. Used to pluralize 'day'/'month'/'year' labels.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: POSTs GraphQL query, raises on non-200
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Sends query+variables to GitHub GraphQL endpoint with HEADERS auth. Returns response on 200, else raises Exception with func name, status, text, QUERY_COUNT.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Fetches total contribution count in date range
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Runs GraphQL contributionsCollection query for USER_NAME between start_date/end_date. Returns int totalContributions; increments query_count.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Fetches repo count or star count via GraphQL
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Queries repositories filtered by owner_affiliation, paginated via cursor. Returns totalCount if count_type='repos', else calls stars_counter on edges.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Paginates commit history, sums additions/deletions
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Queries 100 commits at a time via cursor from repo's default branch. On success delegates to loc_counter_one_repo; on failure force-closes cache file then raises (403 = abuse limit).

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Sums LOC for commits authored by me, recurses pages
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Iterates commit edges, adds additions/deletions/my_commits only when author matches OWNER_ID. If more pages exist, recurses into recursive_loc with next cursor.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Paginates repo list (60 at a time), triggers cache build
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Queries repos with owner_affiliation filter, 60 per page, recursing on hasNextPage. On last page, passes accumulated edges to cache_builder.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Updates per-repo LOC cache file if commit counts changed
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Reads/creates cache file keyed by sha256(username); rebuilds via flush_cache if repo count changed or force_cache. For each repo, if cached commit total mismatches current, calls recursive_loc to refresh LOC, then sums all loc_add/loc_del; returns [add,del,net,cached_bool]. Empty repos caught via TypeError, zeroed out.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Resets cache file entries to zero for all repos
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Keeps comment block, writes fresh line per repo edge (hash + '0 0 0 0'). Called when repo count changed or file just created.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Adds stats from deleted repos via saved archive file
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Reads cache/repository_archive.txt, strips 7-line header/3-line footer comment block, sums LOC and commits from remaining lines. Adds extra commit count from last line's 5th field; gotcha: hardcoded slice indices [7:-3] assume fixed comment format.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Emergency-writes cache data before crash
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Writes cache_comment + data to cache file so partial progress isn't lost. Called right before recursive_loc raises on API failure.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Sums stargazers count across repo edges
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Iterates list of repo nodes, accumulates totalCount from stargazers. Returns int total.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Injects computed stats into SVG text elements
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Parses SVG file, calls justify_format for each stat field (commits, stars, repos, contributions, followers, LOC add/del/net) with fixed padding lengths. Writes modified tree back to same file.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Sets element text and pads with dots for alignment
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Formats ints with comma separators, calls find_and_replace for main text and a matching '_dots' element with computed dot padding. Dot count/spacing depends on length param vs text length; short gaps (<=2) use fixed spacing map.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Sets text of SVG element by id
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Finds element via XPath id selector, sets .text if found. No-op if element missing.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Sums commit counts from cache file
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Reads cache file, skips comment_size header lines, sums 3rd whitespace-separated field (commit count) per line. Returns total int.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Fetches user's GraphQL node ID and account creation date
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Queries id and createdAt for given username. Returns tuple ({'id':...}, createdAt string).

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Fetches follower count for username
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Queries followers.totalCount via GraphQL. Returns int.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Increments global API call counter by func id
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Mutates global QUERY_COUNT dict, incrementing entry keyed by funct_id. No return value.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Times execution of a function call
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Runs funct(*args), measures elapsed time via time.perf_counter(). Returns tuple (result, elapsed_seconds).

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.oneLiner: Prints timing line, optionally returns padded value
../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.detail: Prints query_type label and difference formatted as s or ms depending on magnitude. If whitespace given, returns funct_return as comma-formatted left-padded string, else returns raw funct_return.

today.py::format_plural.detail: Takes numeric unit, returns empty string if 1 else 's'. Used to pluralize 'day'/'month'/'year' labels.

today.py::simple_request.oneLiner: POSTs GraphQL query, raises on non-200
today.py::simple_request.detail: Sends query+variables to GitHub GraphQL endpoint with HEADERS auth. Returns response on 200, else raises Exception with func name, status, text, QUERY_COUNT.

today.py::graph_commits.oneLiner: Fetches total contribution count in date range
today.py::graph_commits.detail: Runs GraphQL contributionsCollection query for USER_NAME between start_date/end_date. Returns int totalContributions; increments query_count.

today.py::graph_repos_stars.oneLiner: Fetches repo count or star count via GraphQL
today.py::graph_repos_stars.detail: Queries repositories filtered by owner_affiliation, paginated via cursor. Returns totalCount if count_type='repos', else calls stars_counter on edges.

today.py::loc_counter_one_repo.oneLiner: Sums LOC for commits authored by me, recurses pages
today.py::loc_counter_one_repo.detail: Iterates commit edges, adds additions/deletions/my_commits only when author matches OWNER_ID. If more pages exist, recurses into recursive_loc with next cursor.

today.py::loc_query.oneLiner: Paginates repo list (60 at a time), triggers cache build
today.py::loc_query.detail: Queries repos with owner_affiliation filter, 60 per page, recursing on hasNextPage. On last page, passes accumulated edges to cache_builder.

today.py::cache_builder.oneLiner: Updates per-repo LOC cache file if commit counts changed
today.py::cache_builder.detail: Reads/creates cache file keyed by sha256(username); rebuilds via flush_cache if repo count changed or force_cache. For each repo, if cached commit total mismatches current, calls recursive_loc to refresh LOC, then sums all loc_add/loc_del; returns [add,del,net,cached_bool]. Empty repos caught via TypeError, zeroed out.

today.py::flush_cache.oneLiner: Resets cache file entries to zero for all repos
today.py::flush_cache.detail: Keeps comment block, writes fresh line per repo edge (hash + '0 0 0 0'). Called when repo count changed or file just created.

today.py::force_close_file.detail: Writes cache_comment + data to cache file so partial progress isn't lost. Called right before recursive_loc raises on API failure.

today.py::stars_counter.oneLiner: Sums stargazers count across repo edges
today.py::stars_counter.detail: Iterates list of repo nodes, accumulates totalCount from stargazers. Returns int total.

today.py::find_and_replace.oneLiner: Sets text of SVG element by id
today.py::find_and_replace.detail: Finds element via XPath id selector, sets .text if found. No-op if element missing.

today.py::user_getter.oneLiner: Fetches user's GraphQL node ID and account creation date
today.py::user_getter.detail: Queries id and createdAt for given username. Returns tuple ({'id':...}, createdAt string).

today.py::follower_getter.detail: Queries followers.totalCount via GraphQL. Returns int.

today.py::query_count.oneLiner: Increments global API call counter by func id
today.py::query_count.detail: Mutates global QUERY_COUNT dict, incrementing entry keyed by funct_id. No return value.

today.py::perf_counter.oneLiner: Times execution of a function call
today.py::perf_counter.detail: Runs funct(*args), measures elapsed time via time.perf_counter(). Returns tuple (result, elapsed_seconds).

today.py::formatter.oneLiner: Prints timing line, optionally returns padded value
today.py::formatter.detail: Prints query_type label and difference formatted as s or ms depending on magnitude. If whitespace given, returns funct_return as comma-formatted left-padded string, else returns raw funct_return.

today.py::daily_readme.oneLiner: Formats account age as 'X years, X months, X days'
today.py::daily_readme.detail: Takes joined date, computes relativedelta vs today, returns pluralized string. No side effects, pure calc.

today.py::recursive_loc.oneLiner: Paginates GitHub GraphQL commit history for one repo
today.py::recursive_loc.detail: Fetches 100 commits/page via cursor, recurses through loc_counter_one_repo to sum additions/deletions/commits. On non-200 closes cache file and raises (403 = abuse-limit hit); returns 0 if repo has no default branch.

today.py::svg_overwrite.oneLiner: Writes stat values into SVG template in place
today.py::svg_overwrite.detail: Parses SVG XML, finds placeholder tags by name, swaps in formatted age/commits/stars/repos/contributions/followers/LOC-added/deleted/total, writes file back. Mutates file on disk; number formatting uses comma separators; relies on find_and_replace matching tag ids exactly.

today.py::justify_format.oneLiner: Sets element text and pads with dots for alignment
today.py::justify_format.detail: Converts int to comma-formatted string, replaces element_id text, then computes dot padding (length - text len) and replaces sibling '{element_id}_dots' element. Special-cases padding <=2 (empty/space/'. ') vs longer dot runs.

today.py::commit_counter.oneLiner: Sums total commits from cache file
today.py::commit_counter.detail: Reads cache/<sha256(username)>.txt, skips comment_size header lines, sums 3rd whitespace-separated field per line. Assumes fixed cache line format from cache_builder.

../../../../private/tmp/claude-501/-User.overview: Script owns GitHub profile stats generation: pulls contribution/LOC/star/follower data via GraphQL, caches per-repo LOC counts to disk, renders results into SVG readme badges.

today.py.overview: Owns GitHub profile stat generation: fetch commits/repos/stars/LOC via GraphQL, cache LOC per repo, render values into SVG templates. Sits standalone as scheduled script, no other module depends on it.
